generate(Context, List<Node>, List<Property>) - Static method in class it.polito.mito.rest.common.NetContextGenerator
This method generates the nework context (the link between nodenames and node IPs in z3)

Generates Acl by processing the firewall configuration

Generates Cache internal node from cache resources configuration
generateNetObj(Node) - Method in class it.polito.mito.rest.common.NodeNetworkObject
This function process the node and generate a network object according to functional type, it also generate the configuration according to the type.
